title: Block Armor Remake
description: A from-scratch remake of the popular "Block Armor" mod by 2piradians, now for the latest versions of the game!
body:
[![Also on CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Also%20On%20CurseForge&color=black&labelColor=orange&style=for-the-badge&logo=CurseForge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/block-armor-remake)

# Welcome to Block Armor Remake!

This mod is a remake of [the original “Block Armor” by 2piradians](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/block-armor). We loved the original Block Armor mod, but we were disappointed that development had stopped and it would not be updated. So we took it into our hands to recreate the original mod and update it to the latest versions of the game! **This mod is unfinished and remains in active development!**

## Features

- Custom Textures, ensuring that key features are displayed on all armor pieces
- Custom Set Effects, while staying true to the original, have different functionality.
- Built on the latest mod loaders and modern versions of the game

## Custom Effects
**Note: While the effects are based on the original mod, some may behave or function slightly differently due to none of the original code being used.**
- Health Boost (Increases Max Hearts by 10) - Obsidian
- Flame Resistant (Self-Enchants armor with Fire Prot 4) - Obsidian
- Illuminated (Lights up the area around the player) -  Glowstone, Jack O'Lantern
- Expirience Giving (Slowly gives XP to the player) - Amythyst, Bookshelf
- Feeder (Automaticly keeps your hunger replenished) - Melon
- Ender (Teleports you a couple of blocks) - Chorus Fruit
- Rocky (Makes the player sink in water) - Stone, Granite, Mossy Stone Bricks, Tuff, Tuff Bricks, Red Sandstone, Calcite
- Regrow (Slowly repairs damaged armor) - Dirt, Mossy Stone Bricks, Red Mushroom, Brown Mushroom

## Implemented Block Armors

- Amethyst
- Bookshelf
- Calcite
- Chours Flower
- Dirt
- Glowstone
- Granite
- Honeycomb
- Jack o’Lantern
- Melon
- Brown Mushroom
- Red Mushroom
- Obsidian
- Oak Planks
- Red Sandstone
- Sponge
- Stone
- Mossy Stone Bricks
- Tuff
- Tuff Bricks

## Credits
